summary: Smoke | Broadcast Options - Switch Alt Audio
description: This is valid for both Live and Archived games.
gherkin:
Given the user is entitled to multiple video feed and logged into mlb.com/tv
And the user has selected a game with multiple feeds
When the user opens the Broadcast Options in the scrubber
And the user selects an alt audio feed
Then the alt audio feed that was selected is playing back
And the alt audio is in-sync with the video
